data.description:
## Context
Capture the substrate design so the two consumer epics build on a documented contract.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] An ADR under `docs/adr/` records: DSSE envelope, PAE, pluggable scheme registry, per-kind policy table, domain separation, HMAC-as-legacy.
- [ ] A short `docs/` reference documents `sign(kind,body)`/`verify(kind,envelope,trust_root)` and how a new kind registers a `{scheme,namespace,trust_root}`.
data.title: attest: ADR + developer docs for the signing substrate
